idea-plugin.name: Git Local Review
idea-plugin.description:
Review your changes like a pull request — before it exists.

Open a virtual pull request over any diff range — a comparison between any two refs (A...B, same as a GitHub PR when B is HEAD), the staging area, or the working tree — and track per-file reviewed state with GitHub-style viewed checks in a dedicated tool window. Reviewed state survives commits, is invalidated automatically when a file changes again, and is kept per diff range in your local workspace.

action.description: Toggle the reviewed state of the current file
